titles.title: I'm A Conqueror And I'm Victorious

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm a conqueror I'm victorious I am reigning with Jesus I am seated in Heavenly places In Him in Him

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Because the Kingdom of God is within me I know no defeat only victory Because the Kingdom of God is within me I know no defeat only strength and power

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We are a people of power We are a people of praise

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We are a people of promise Jesus has risen

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: He’s conquered the grave Risen, yes, born again

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: We walk in the power of His name

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Power to be the sons of God Sons of God, sons of God We are the sons, hey Sons of God, hey, hey, hey
